category_sources: Official pipebench homepage classifies it as Benchmark/status and says it measures pipe speed.
source_facts.description says it measures speed of STDIN/STDOUT communication.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official pipebench page and best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository was found, only official release tarballs and downstream package sources.
tags_sources: Official homepage says pipebench measures pipe speed by passing data along to the next process.
source_facts.description mentions measuring STDIN/STDOUT communication speed.
